title: mentha arvensis var. javanica
intro: Mentha arvensis var. javanica, also known as Java wild mint or Japanese mint, is a variety of the Mentha arvensis species, a type of peppermint native to Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. javanica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Mentha arvensis var. javanica can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions for use in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
